title: 10 Things a Disciplined Man Never Negotiates
caption:
The disciplined man isn't the one with the perfect schedule or the 5 AM alarm.

He's the one who decided there are certain things he doesn't put up for debate. His first hour. His word to himself. The private tab. Brotherhood. The apology he owes. The version of him that God sees.

Not because he's rigid — because he knows what happens when he lets these slide. He's watched it rot a man from the inside out. He's been that man.

Ten non-negotiables. Not rules. Standards.

Save this. Print it. Send it to the man who needs a floor.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #selfmastery #christianity #scripture
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
